about_desc_1: INSEED provides accurate and comprehensive demographic data to support policy and planning.
about_desc_2: We support government agencies, researchers, and international organizations.
adjust_variables: Adjust the variables below to simulate different demographic scenarios
ai_scan_desc: Select the datasets you want to audit for inconsistencies and structural errors.
ai_scan_logic_desc: Detecting duplicates, outliers, and suspicious values
ai_scan_no_issues_desc: No issues detected across selected tables.
amber_warning: Amber borders indicate zones requiring immediate data cleaning.
analyst_forbidden_desc: You do not have permission to access the administrative section.
analytics_model_desc: This model uses a multi-variable regression analysis combined with historical census data (2000-2023) to project future population trends. Simulation results are estimates based on the provided variables.
analyzing_trends: Analyzing national demographic and economic trends
anomaly_corrected_desc: The AI has successfully corrected the data anomaly.
automated_report_desc: Generate comprehensive PDF reports with one click
children_per_woman: Average number of children per woman
clean_console_audit_prompt: Please audit the data via the 'Compare Before/After' button first.
clean_console_please_wait: Please wait while AI cleaning runs...
clean_console_subtitle: Real-time supervision of the Gatekeeper pipeline (Isolation Forest & Beers smoothing).
clean_console_success_desc: The file has been cleaned, validated, and promoted to the Gold standard.
clean_console_override_log: >> ANALYST OVERRIDE: Reviewed repair proposal and promoted dataset to Gold.
clean_console_override_desc: The repaired dataset has been promoted to Gold and is available in the database.
clean_console_db_initiating: >> DATABASE: Initiating Secure Transaction for PostgreSQL...
clean_console_fail_suggestion: Please verify flagged cells in your Excel file and ensure all 23 provinces are represented before re-uploading.
clean_console_fetching_remote: >> REMOTE: Fetching pending dataset #{{id}} from server...
clean_console_quality_fail_desc: The quality score did not reach the minimum Gatekeeper threshold (95%).
clean_console_system_error_desc: The backend could not process this file.
clean_log_connecting: >> CONNECTING: Establishing connection with backend pipeline...
clean_log_db_success: >> DATABASE: Transaction SUCCESS. All records committed to 'indicators_data'.
clean_log_error_fetch: >> ERROR: Failed to fetch dataset #{{id}} from server.
clean_log_error_parse: >> ERROR: Failed to parse raw data payload.
clean_log_bg_started: >> BACKGROUND TASK: Cleaning task enqueued successfully. Monitoring telemetry...
clean_log_interpolation: >> INTERPOLATION: Filled missing values using linear scaling.
clean_log_system_ready: >> SYSTEM READY: Loaded remote payload '{{filename}}' [{{rows}} rows]
clean_log_system_ready_session: >> SYSTEM READY: Loaded session payload '{{filename}}' [{{rows}} rows]
clean_log_warning_no_data: >> WARNING: No pending data found in session. Please start from Data Import.
clean_toast_complete_desc: The file has been cleaned and validated successfully.
clean_toast_save_success_desc: The data has been inserted into the PostgreSQL database successfully.
cleaning_failure_review: Cleaned, but Health Score is {{score}}%. Review Error Log to reach 95%.
cleaning_success_unlocked: Excellent! Health Score is {{score}}%. Dataset unlocked for Export.
cleaning_summary_desc: The AI engine has successfully processed the dataset.
click_province: Click a province to view data
common_verification_desc: Please enter the code to secure your session
confirm_delete_user: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.

data_import_ai_compatible_desc: This file contains all mandatory columns (ISF, e0, TMI, etc.) to feed the Researcher's demographic forecasts.
data_import_cancel_desc: You can correct the file manually and re-import it.

data_import_census_unusable: This "Census" file cannot be used for AI projections because it lacks critical columns: {{columns}}.
data_import_census_validation_msg: Census dataset for ML requires 8 columns. Missing: [{{missing}}]. Required: year, province/region, population, ISF, e0, TMI, Cc, Cm.
data_import_display_limit: Display limited to the first 100 errors.
data_import_drag_drop: Drag and drop your files here
data_import_drag_or_browse: Drag your file here or click to browse
data_import_excel_read_error: Error while reading the Excel file.
data_import_format_warning_desc: AI repair is a statistical estimation (Interpolation or KNN). If you need absolute precision (100%), we recommend canceling and correcting these {{count}} values manually in your source file before re-importing.
data_import_multi_sheet_warning: Multi-Sheet Excel file detected. Only the first sheet ({{sheet}}) will be processed.
data_import_no_data_saved_notice: No data is saved before validation of the health report.
data_import_no_data_saved_yet: No data has been saved yet.
data_import_page_subtitle: Data health check with AI repair authorization (Pre-Flight Check).
data_import_rows_analyzed: Rows analyzed. No data has been saved yet.
data_import_validated_desc: No anomalies detected (Format, Missing, or Logical). The file is healthy.

data_quality_desc: Some regions have missing data points for 2018-2020 due to incomplete census records.

researcher_methodological_detail: Projections follow an annual demographic cohort-survival methodology based on the latest INSEED data. Under this structure, sliders act as multipliers over fertility (ISF), survivability/mortality transition matrices (e0), and cohort retention (TMI) over the forecast horizon.
researcher_ai_model_offline: AI Model offline, showing official reference.
viz_subtitle_advanced: Advanced indicators correlation & multi-regional analysis baseline
viz_scatter_hint_detail: Scatter plots map correlation trajectories. Please select a secondary variable in the filters sidebar to start.

viz_volatility_desc_detail: Most unstable region measured by YoY percentage variation in {{indicator}}.
